scope: Tier-2 migration: the 3 legacy-parity read streams only (users, channels, channel_messages); legacy slack is read-only (Write always returns ErrUnsupportedOperation) and the full Slack Web API surface (threads, channel_members, files, reactions, admin.*, apps.*, oauth.v2.access itself) is out of scope until Pass B

excluded.reason: /conversations.replies is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
/conversations.members is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
/files.list is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
one-time authorization-code exchange performed by the credentials/install layer, not a repeatable connector auth grant
Enterprise Grid admin API, not exposed by this connector
